resultList.dtldesc: Property details This spacious independent floor property is located in Block D Rajouri Garden, New Delhi, offering ground, first, and second floor options. Each floor features four bedrooms, making it ideal for large families or those seeking expansive living space. Every bedroom comes with an attached washroom and dresser area, while the bedrooms are unfurnished, allowing buyers to personalize the interiors. The property is vaastu compliant with a north facing main entrance, ensuring a positive and well balanced living environment.Property SpecificationsEach floor consists of four bedrooms with attached western style washrooms, along with one common washroom and a separate servant room with its own washroom. The apartment includes a total of six balconies, with balconies attached to all bedrooms and an additional balcony connected to the living room overlooking the main road. Flooring includes premium Italian marble in all common areas and wooden flooring in the bedrooms, including the master bedroom. The kitchen is fully modular and equipped with cabinets, chimney, and hob. Piped gas connection is available through IGL. Bathrooms are fitted with geysers and shower cubicles. AC VRV system and electrical fixtures such as lights and fans are provided, while the living room comes without furniture.FacilityThe property offers four parking spaces per floor, providing ample parking convenience. Although there is no hundred percent power backup and no society amenities like clubhouse or swimming pool, the apartment ensures comfortable daily living with essential provisions. There is no dedicated security guard or CCTV installation within the building. However, the layout, modern fittings, and high quality flooring add significant value to the residence.LocalitySituated in Rajouri Garden, this property enjoys excellent connectivity and access to daily conveniences. The area is well served by Mayapuri Metro Station and Rajouri Garden Metro Station, ensuring smooth metro connectivity across Delhi. Prominent schools nearby include Cambridge Foundation School, Shadley Public School, and Gurukul International Preschool. Shopping and entertainment options are available at Rajouri Garden Market, West side Mall, and Pacific Mall. Healthcare facilities such as MKW Hospital and Kukreja Hospital and Heart Centre are also easily accessible. The area is well connected by both metro and road, making daily commuting convenient and efficient.

resultList.dtldesc: Property DetailsThis well maintained 2 BHK builder floor apartment is available for sale in Noida Extension in Greater Noida. The property is located on the 3rd floor and offers a comfortable living space suitable for small families or working professionals. The flat includes two spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms and is designed to provide a practical and convenient lifestyle. The home is semi furnished with wardrobes in both bedrooms and a dressing table in one bedroom. With a price of 50 lakh this property offers a good opportunity for buyers looking for a ready residential space in a rapidly developing location with strong road connectivity.Property SpecificationsThe apartment is thoughtfully planned with a functional layout and good ventilation. Both bedrooms are semi furnished and include built in wardrobes while one bedroom also features a dressing table. The flooring across the entire apartment including the master bedroom is finished with vitrified tiles giving the home a neat and durable surface. The flat has one large balcony that is connected to both bedrooms and overlooks the alley area. The kitchen is a fully functional modular kitchen equipped with cabinets chimney sink and RO system and also has piped gas connection. Additional fittings include a TV panel in the drawing room digital lock on the main entrance and electrical fixtures such as lights and fans. The apartment is Vastu compliant with a north east facing entrance. There are two western style bathrooms with one attached to the master bedroom and the other serving as a common bathroom.FacilityThe property offers essential facilities for comfortable living. Open parking space is available for residents within the premises. The building provides power backup for common areas and lift operations ensuring smooth functioning of shared facilities. The society is also working on installing CCTV cameras for enhanced security in common areas. The apartment benefits from good natural light and ventilation along with modern fittings such as modular kitchen setup RO system chimney and digital door lock. These features make the home convenient and ready for immediate occupancy.LocalityThe property is located in Noida Extension in Greater Noida which is a fast growing residential area with excellent road connectivity. The flat is situated on the main road which ensures smooth access to public transportation and daily commuting routes. The main market of Bisrakh is located nearby providing easy access to grocery stores shops and other daily needs. Yatharth Hospital is about one to one point five kilometers away ensuring quick access to medical care. The neighborhood is well connected and continues to develop with new residential and commercial establishments making it a promising location for both living and investment.

resultList.dtldesc: Contemporary 3 BHK Builder Floor in Prime Gurgaon Location::::Set within a well-established residential pocket of Gurgaon, this ready-to-move 3 BHK builder floor offers a refined living experience with excellent urban connectivity. Located opposite Greenwood and close to HUDA City Centre Metro, the property is ideally suited for end users seeking a modern home with everyday conveniences within close reach.::::Property Specifications::Positioned on the 3rd floor of a low-rise building comprising only four floors, this independent builder floor enjoys privacy and a low-density living environment with just four residential units in the building. The apartment features a super built-up area of approximately 1,800 sq. ft with a well-utilised carpet area of around 1,260 sq. ft. The layout includes three spacious bedrooms, three bathrooms, and two balconies, providing ample space and comfort for family living. The living and dining areas are combined, creating a seamless flow for daily use and entertaining. The kitchen is modular and fitted with a chimney, hob, and microwave, offering functionality and modern convenience. Flooring is finished in a combination of Italian marble and quality tiles, lending a premium finish throughout the home. The property is Vaastu compliant, south-west facing, and benefits from good natural light and ventilation. The construction is relatively new and well maintained.::::Facilities::The builder floor is offered semi-furnished and includes essential fittings such as geysers in bathrooms. The building is equipped with a lift for easy access and provides one covered parking space for the residence. A 24-hour water supply ensures uninterrupted daily living, while CCTV surveillance adds an extra layer of security. The property is freehold, enhancing long-term ownership value.::::Locality::This location enjoys strong social and transport infrastructure. The HUDA City Centre Metro station is nearby, with convenient access to Cyber City and Golf Course Road. Schools are located within approximately 250 metres, hospitals within about 300 metres, and local markets around 250 metres, ensuring everyday needs are easily met. The area is well connected by public transport and road networks, making commuting across Gurgaon straightforward and efficient.::::This thoughtfully planned builder floor presents a comfortable and practical residential option in one of Gurgaon's well-connected neighbourhoods, ideal for families seeking quality living with excellent accessibility.
